race.description: Tamworth City Toyota Tamworth Showcase Cup
race.comment: FORMAL DISPLAY (6) is a talented galloper who is unbeaten in two runs this time in. Shouldered the 60kg with ease when sitting on the speed for a comfortable win over 1400m at Warwick Farm. Gets map favours and will prove hard to get past with the 54.5kg. LORD OF BISCAY (2) is chasing his third-straight win fourth-up. Given a J Mac "peach" with a dominant win over 1400m in the Provincial Championships Final at Randwick. Up slightly in weight and expected to go close in this rich vein of form. TAVROS (8) is a durable gelding with excellent second-up figures. Slashing run first-up then came from near last on the turn with a close-up fifth over 1400m at Scone in the Northern Wild Card. Will go back from the draw and launch late. Each-way. PHEARSON (5) second-up for this and coming along nicely for the new yard. Savaged the line with an excellent fifth in the G3 Star Kingdom over 1200m at Rosehill. Since fitted with a slick 1200m trial win. Respect. The chances don't end there.
